hero.title: Build Your Digital Toolkit
hero.subtitle: XPHub offers a suite of practical, efficient software products covering file sharing, bookmark management, image hosting, short links, OCR recognition, and more. Self-hosted or SaaS — there's always one for you.

selfHosted.title: 🏠 Self-Hosted
selfHosted.desc: Deploy on your own server. Your data, your control.

saas.title: ☁️ SaaS Services
saas.desc: Ready to use out of the box. No deployment needed.

devTools.title: 🔧 Open-Source Dev Tools
devTools.desc: API services built for developers, open-source and free.

selfHosted.name: Zdir
selfHosted.desc: Lightweight multi-functional file sharing with upload, preview, and share management.

selfHosted.name: ZMark
selfHosted.desc: Modern bookmark manager & URL navigator with AI search, multi-user, and dual-mode.

selfHosted.name: ZNote
selfHosted.desc: Lightweight note-taking app. Simple and efficient Markdown notes.

selfHosted.name: OneNav
selfHosted.desc: Classic PHP bookmark manager with browser extensions, import, and sharing.

selfHosted.name: Zurl
selfHosted.desc: Simple and practical short URL system with UA blocking, auto title fetching, and data migration.

saas.name: ImgURL
saas.desc: Free image hosting for individuals and small businesses. One-click upload with external links. Running reliably since 2017.

saas.name: PicLink
saas.desc: Image-to-link service for SMBs. Widely used in cross-border e-commerce, logistics forwarding, and more.

saas.name: TCP.mk
saas.desc: Network toolbox with IP lookup, Ping, DNS, and other common network diagnostic tools.

devTools.name: ZOCR
devTools.desc: Online OCR recognition API based on Baidu PP-OCRv6. Docker deployment supported.

devTools.name: ZNSFW
devTools.desc: NSFW image detection API service based on NSFW JS. Simple HTTP calls.

contact.title: 📬 Contact
contact.desc: Have questions or collaboration ideas? Feel free to reach out.

about.title: 🙋 About Me
about.text: I'm xiaoz, an indie developer passionate about building practical, lightweight tools. XPHub is the home of all my products — covering file sharing, bookmark management, image hosting, short links, OCR, and more. Every product is born from real needs, built with a philosophy of simplicity, usability, and reliability. Hope they make your work and life easier.
